ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, listener) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was last updated */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the playlist (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist the song belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the song */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album the song belongs to */,
  "album_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "album_date_precision" TEXT /* Precision of the album release date (e.g., DAY, MONTH, YEAR) */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the song (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the audio feature belongs to */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song (0-1) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song (0-1) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song (0-1) */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song (0-1) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song (0-1) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the song (0-1) */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song (0-1) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song (BPM) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song (dB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the artist belongs to */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_artists_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "track" INTEGER /* Track number of the song in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the playlist */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the playlist was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_access_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the search query */,
  "query" TEXT /* Search query made by the user */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date when the search query was made */,
  "query_time" TEXT /* Time when the search query was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song recommended */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation_time" TEXT /* Time when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
